---
name: Bug report
about: Something isn't working the way it should
title: "[bug] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## What happened

A clear, concise description of the bug.

## What you expected to happen

A clear description of the expected behaviour.

## Steps to reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. Scroll to '...'
4. See error

## Screenshots / video

If applicable, add a screenshot or short clip showing the bug.

## Environment

- URL: e.g. https://krish2248.github.io/futology/predictions/
- Browser + version: e.g. Chrome 130
- OS: e.g. Windows 11, macOS 15, iOS 18
- Device: e.g. desktop, iPhone 15
- Console errors: paste any output from the browser devtools console

## Additional context

Anything else that might be relevant — recent actions, network conditions,
whether it reproduces on another device, etc.
